title.name: Commerce and Economic and Community Development

sections.heading: Secs. 32-180 to 32-182. Connecticut-Israel Exchange Commission; membership; organization. Powers and functions. Assistance from the Department of Economic and Community Development; contributions from private agencies.

body: Sections 32-180 to 32-182 , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 1, 2023.
content.plainText: Sections 32-180 to 32-182 , inclusive, are repealed, effective July 1, 2023.
